steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Words in Context question. The blank must describe GRB 230307A's 200-second duration in the context of neutron merger bursts, which typically last fewer than 2 seconds. The word should convey that this duration is strikingly unusual or anomalous.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'an incident': Generic and neutral — does not capture the sense that 200 seconds is abnormal for this type of burst. ✗
  • Choice B — 'a reprieve': Means a temporary relief from something unpleasant. Makes no sense in describing a burst duration. ✗
  • Choice C — 'a coincidence': Implies two unrelated events happening together by chance, which does not fit the idea of a single anomalous measurement. ✗
  • Choice D — 'an oddity': Means something strange or unusual. Precisely captures how a 200-second burst is a stark departure from the typical sub-2-second neutron merger burst. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
